spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1181 Since the full summary is not yet out, here are some additional spoilers for Chapter 1181 from @WorstGenHQ -Imu creates an insanely large Omen, covers both his weapon and himself with it
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1181 Since the full summary is not yet out, here are some additional spoilers for Chapter 1181 from @WorstGenHQ -Imu creates an insanely large Omen, covers both his weapon and himself with it, and transforms it into a gigantic flail. Later, he uses Omen again, and the weapon changes into a black blade called Nemesis. -We see Imu and Joyboy laughing together, and Imu tells him that domination is what brings peace to the world. -Imu's sword, Nemesis, has the epithet "Blade of Heavenly Divine Punishment"

misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1181] So to further go in detail about the word nemesis and the name for the sword that Oda has chosen for imu sword. Most people just see the word nemesis & think about archenemy. But actua
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1181] So to further go in detail about the word nemesis and the name for the sword that Oda has chosen for imu sword. Most people just see the word nemesis & think about archenemy. But actually in Greek myth, the goddess nemesis represented what is the divine balance & retribution justice!! Imu has created a system that is build on justice throughout the marines & within the inner circle with him,gorosei & holy knights, they represent balance when the world is dealing with situations that effect them. So Imu is basically a sword of justice,balance & to spite those that are hubris aka prideful.

misc.text: ¿A las pacientes de la unidad de mama no las llamas, a ver cómo van? No tienes vergüenza. Juanma Moreno (@JuanMa_Moreno) Anoche hablé con Morante. Lo encontré optimista, entero y esperanzado. Pero hay que ser prudentes, porque las lesiones son complejas. Le mandé mucho ánimo y fuerza, y deseo que tenga una pronta recuperación. Video — https://nitter.net/JuanMa_Moreno/status/2046523593803091983#m
